game_info.title: Temple Escape 3D
game_info.concept:
The Original Endless Running Adventure!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/temple-run/id420009108

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

The Original Endless Running Adventure!
Experience the thrill of Temple Run – the global phenomenon that redefined mobile gaming!
Steal the cursed idol and escape from the relentless Demon Monkeys in a heart-pounding adventure through ancient temples, jungle ruins, and precarious cliff edges.
Outrun danger in the ultimate maze-running, jungle-escaping, temple adventure!

- Swipe to turn, jump, and slide past deadly obstacles
- Race through temples, bridges, and treacherous paths
- Collect coins, unlock diverse characters, and boost your power-ups
- Test your reflexes in a fast and frenzied experience
- Challenge friends & climb the leaderboards

"Temple Run is that heart-pounding action movie moment – but non-stop!” – SlideToPlay
"One of the most thrilling and fun running games ever!" – TheAppera
"A fast and frenzied experience." – IGN
"Very addicting… a truly different running game!" – Appolicious

Join over 50 MILLION players worldwide in this legendary treasure-hunting escape!

Download now and see how far you can run!
game_info.description:
Temple Escape 3D

You have stolen the cursed idol from the ancient temple! Now you must run for your life to escape the Evil Demon Monkeys nipping at your heels.

Run through an endless maze of temple walls, crumbling paths, and treacherous traps. The path is procedurally generated and gets faster the longer you survive.

Objective:
- Run as far as possible without dying.
- Collect yellow coins for bonus points.
- Avoid obstacles by jumping or sliding.
- Make sharp 90-degree turns at corners to stay on the path.
- Don't fall off the edge!
game_info.controls:
- ENTER: Start Game
- ESC: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart (when Game Over)
- UP Arrow / W / Space: Jump (over low obstacles and gaps)
- DOWN Arrow / S: Slide (under high obstacles)
- LEFT Arrow / A: Move Left / Turn Left at corners
- RIGHT Arrow / D: Move Right / Turn Right at corners

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player jump mechanics and obstacle avoidance.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test AI will control the player. It will detect upcoming "Log" obstacles using raycasting/lookahead and trigger a Jump action at the appropriate distance to clear it.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should successfully jump over at least 3 obstacles without collision. The game phase should remain "PLAYING" and score should increase.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify turning mechanics at path corners.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The test AI will detect upcoming corners (Right or Left turns) and execute the corresponding Turn action when the player enters the intersection trigger zone.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should successfully navigate at least 2 corners without running off the edge. The camera should rotate smoothly to follow the new path direction.

TEST_2.expected: The player should successfully navigate at least 2 corners without running off the edge. The camera should rotate smoothly to follow the new path direction.

TEST_3.strategy_description: The test AI will detect "Fire Trap" or "High Beam" obstacles and trigger the Slide action to pass underneath them safely.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player should pass under obstacles without taking damage or dying. The player height should visually decrease during the slide.
TEST_3.strategy: The test AI will detect "Fire Trap" or "High Beam" obstacles and trigger the Slide action to pass underneath them safely.
TEST_3.expected: The player should pass under obstacles without taking damage or dying. The player height should visually decrease during the slide.

TEST_4.test_description: Verify game over condition on falling.
TEST_4.strategy_description: The test AI will intentionally run straight at a corner without turning, causing the player to run off the edge of the platform.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The player Y position should drop below a threshold, and the game state should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE".
